# waggle_pool_placements (Data Source)

Placements Waggle computed for a pool: which hypervisor and vmid each VM should use.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# waggle_pool_placements — read the placements the oracle computed for a pool.
# Returns a typed list of { id, hypervisor_id, hypervisor_name, vmid, created_at },
# the input you feed to a VM provisioner (see ../../proxmox-node-pool).

data "waggle_pool_placements" "workers" {
  pool_id = "00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000" # waggle_pools.workers.id
}

output "placement_targets" {
  description = "hypervisor + vmid per placement."
  value = [
    for p in data.waggle_pool_placements.workers.placements : {
      hypervisor = p.hypervisor_name
      vmid       = p.vmid
    }
  ]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `pool_id` (String) ID of the pool whose placements to fetch.

### Read-Only

- `placements` (Attributes List) Placements for the pool, one element per VM. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--placements))

<a id="nestedatt--placements"></a>
### Nested Schema for `placements`

Read-Only:

- `created_at` (String) Placement creation timestamp.
- `hypervisor_id` (String) Target hypervisor ID.
- `hypervisor_name` (String) Target hypervisor name (the Proxmox node to create the VM on).
- `id` (String) Placement ID.
- `vmid` (Number) Reserved Proxmox vmid for the VM; null until assigned.
